calendar.matters:
Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Minor
Off Calendar Dec-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Meghan Stevens, Esq. for and with the Petitioner Leslie Lai, as guardian ad litem for Kelly Lai, a Minor Claimant.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Attorney's fees: $2,500.00
Reimbursement of litigation costs and medical expenses total $1,130.74
A net balance of $6,369.26 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, 500 Battery Street, San Francisco, CA until Minor's reaches the age of 18 years.
Order approving Minor's Compromise and Order to deposit money into blocked account were signed by in open court (see scanned doc. for details of order).

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
